name: alexandria
description: Entry point for the Alexandria token source (design-constitution §22). Themes are modifier contexts over theme-invariant token names; last source in resolutionOrder wins. Compiled by our generator (C15) into CSS variables, TS types, docs, and validator input.

theme.description: A theme is a re-assignment of values to the same roles (§21), shipped only if it passes every contract in contracts.json.
